name: 1:1 (manager / report)
description: Granola-style summary for 1:1 meetings — wins, blockers, growth, follow-ups.

sections.title: Wins this week
sections.instruction: List what the report celebrated, shipped, or made progress on. Quote directly when impactful.

sections.title: Blockers + asks
sections.instruction: List what is blocking the report and what they need from the manager. Be specific about who owns each unblock.

sections.title: Growth + career
sections.instruction: Note any career conversation, skill development, feedback given or received, promotion signals. If none discussed, omit this section.

sections.title: Action items
sections.instruction: Two-column table: Manager owns | Report owns. Each row a concrete next step with a due date if mentioned.

sections.title: Topics for next 1:1
sections.instruction: Bullet anything deferred or worth raising next time.
